feedback.summary: G-004 implementation fully satisfies all 5 axes at 100.0/100 weighted score against threshold 90 (medium tier). No failures; 9 N/A items correctly excluded from denominators per C-26. Pure-helper/React-shell separation (C-32) preserved: rowStatusStyle.ts + applyUndo are React-free; useChangeTracking.ts wraps with useReducer + useCallback. C-30 spec truth table discipline correctly resolved — 'deleted' branch follows D5/EC-06/branch table/Section 11.2 authority over EC-03 prose, with originalMap.delete(key) leak fix in place.
feedback.specCompliance: All 6 spec Section 7 files modified exactly as enumerated. F-01 (file existence), F-02 (Section 7 1:1 match), F-04 (API signatures), F-05 (no prompt-spec drift), F-06 (EC-03 vs D5 deviation documented) all YES in implement-score and verified independently here.
feedback.leakFixVerification: applyUndo 'deleted' branch (changeMap.ts L397-410) correctly calls both statusMap.delete(key) AND originalMap.delete(key). This prevents the EC-06 originalMap leak in the unchanged→update→delete→undo→update sequence. Verified by direct Read.
feedback.structuralSurfaceVerification: AC-004 structural/functional split delivered: ChangeTrackingConfig.editedCells?: boolean (types.ts L101) + ChangeTrackingAPI.editedCellsMap: ReadonlyMap<string, boolean> (types.ts L148) + stub useMemo in hook (useChangeTracking.ts L201). G-005 runtime wiring deferred — documented in ADR-007 D9 + spec Section 13.2.
